entities.name: LAND ACCESS
entities.description: The ability of farmers to obtain and use land for agricultural purposes

entities.name: YOUNG FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers belonging to the younger generation seeking land access

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where land access challenges for young farmers are prevalent

entities.name: INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Formal and informal rules, norms, and organizations that influence land access and transfer

entities.name: INTERGENERATIONAL DYNAMICS
entities.description: The social and familial interactions between generations affecting land transfer

entities.name: GENERATIONAL RENEWAL
entities.description: The process of ensuring a continuous flow of new, younger farmers into the agricultural sector

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER IRRIGATION SCHEMES
entities.description: Agricultural systems providing irrigation infrastructure to small-scale farmers

entities.name: FARM TRANSFER
entities.description: The process of transferring land ownership or control between generations

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the case study on smallholder irrigation schemes was conducted

entities.name: QUALITATIVE DATA
entities.description: Non-numerical information gathered from interviews to understand perspectives

entities.name: INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A data collection method used to gather insights from young people, parents, and practitioners

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL ANALYSIS AND DEVELOPMENT FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A theoretical framework used to analyze the influence of institutions on behavior and outcomes

entities.name: PLOT ACCESS ARRANGEMENTS
entities.description: The specific mechanisms and rules governing how land plots are accessed

entities.name: FLEXIBLE LEASING ARRANGEMENTS
entities.description: Adaptable land rental agreements used by young farmers to gain plot access

entities.name: PLOT TRANSFER
entities.description: The specific act of transferring control of a land plot from one person to another

entities.name: RURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the quality of life and economic well-being of people living in rural areas
